description: 12-token pilot source plan TEMPLATE (Phase 12C-1B2B). Identity fields are populated from the approved V2 registry. No source has been researched, found, verified or approved. Every entry starts unresearched/unreviewed with all approval and reference fields null. This file must be reviewed, researched and explicitly approved (per entry) by a human product owner in a later phase before any processing can occur - npm run logos:validate-plan enforces that no source becomes eligible for processing merely because a value has been filled in here.

entries.pilotInclusionReason: V1 anchor asset; simple circular mark; establishes the PNG/SVG brand-kit baseline case.
entries.permittedVariant: Higher-resolution official bitcoin.org iOS orange circular Bitcoin mark (114×114 PNG); symbol-only.
entries.notes: Official higher-resolution bitcoin.org iOS Bitcoin mark selected over the Trust Wallet provider fallback. Source used strictly for truthful token/project identification; no affiliation or endorsement is implied. The exact approved source bytes are preserved and only Rush Pi normalization policy v1 may be applied. General redistribution or image-specific trademark permission was not fully explicit. The product owner expressly approved this constrained use at 2026-07-22T05:21:30+02:00.

entries.pilotInclusionReason: V1 anchor asset; official SVG brand kit widely available; second baseline case.
entries.permittedVariant: Official transparent purple ETH diamond (SVG); monochrome, symbol-only.
entries.notes: Official ethereum.org brand asset. Non-code ethereum.org content is provided under CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise marked; attribution applies, trademark rights remain reserved, the asset is not altered and use must not imply endorsement. No broader rights are claimed than this cited evidence provides.

entries.pilotInclusionReason: Deliberate rebrand/migration case (provider currently labels this 'Gram (prev. Toncoin)'); canonical mark choice requires human product-owner approval.
entries.notes: The immutable V2 registry identifies Toncoin/TON while current official sources identify the native coin as Gram/GRAM. A versioned registry correction and compatibility review are required before logo approval.

entries.pilotInclusionReason: Deliberately difficult identity/source case: institutional RWA network with limited consumer-facing brand assets; may require provider-fallback review and legal review of redistribution rights.
entries.permittedVariant: Official Canton network favicon/mark (442×442 PNG); network mark, not a token-specific CC coin icon.
entries.notes: Official Canton network mark under the official brand guidelines, which permit conditional referential use subject to attribution, no alteration and no implied endorsement; no broader rights are claimed than this cited evidence provides. The selected asset is a Canton network mark, not a token-specific Canton Coin icon; it is used to identify Canton ecosystem context and must not be described as an official CC coin icon.
